violations.note: Fallback chain drift breaks resilient outage handling.

remediation: 2. Confirm intended fallback models: Opus → Gemma4:e2b
3. Update config and test chain resilience
4. Verify all agents route correctly under degraded conditions
resolution: CHG-0075 TKT-0022: Intentional policy change. Defaults fallback changed to Haiku-only. Aria policy prohibits Opus/Gemma4. Warden baseline (model-drift-check.sh) updated to match. Not a drift — a Ken-approved change.
